title: LEGO City Yellow Bulldozer Toy - Large Construction Vehicle Building Set - incl. 3 Minifigures plus Loose Bricks & Road Signs - Birthday Gift for 8+ Year Old Boys - 60466
features: A buildable bulldozer toy for kids – Building your own city is big fun with the LEGO City Yellow Bulldozer building toy for 8 year old boys, girls and older fans of construction vehicle toys
What's in the box? – This LEGO City building set includes a toy bulldozer, plus three LEGO minifigures: a driver and two construction workers for role-play adventures

Construction toy inspired by real vehicles and machines – Kids can raise the front blade, lower the dual-shank ripper and push the vehicle to activate the moving pistons and spinning engine cooler fan
LEGO construction playset with accessories – This fun building toy comes with LEGO minifigure accessories including a construction sign, wrench and walkie-talkie for realistic site play
Birthday gift idea for kids – This LEGO City set makes a fun gift for 8+ year old boys and girls who love building sets, construction vehicle toys and creative STEM construction play
Expand the play – Kids can expand their adventures by adding this construction toy to other LEGO City building sets (sold separately) for more fun on the site
A city without limits – LEGO City creative toys inspire kids to explore, build and create a world full of vehicles, structures, LEGO minifigures and endless imaginative adventures
description: From the manufacturer Construction site building toy Bring in the mighty bulldozer! Fuel kids’ fascination for cool construction vehicles with this feature-rich LEGO City Yellow Bulldozer building toy for ages 8 and over. Authentic replica model Detailed model with realistic functions Building your own city is big fun with this LEGO City Yellow Bulldozer playset. Previous page Just like the real thing Functions include a raisable front blade and rear dual-shank ripper. Built for heavyweight action This colossal machine comes with huge tracks for tackling rough terrain. Meet the crew Includes a driver and 2 construction worker minifigures, plus accessories for imaginative play. Next page A fun way to build Enter a digital world of building Kids can enjoy an intuitive building adventure with the LEGO Builder app, where they can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track their progress as they build. More sets to discover Explore the LEGO City world Combine this toy bulldozer with other playsets from the LEGO City range for even more fun (each set sold separately). Previous page LEGO City Emergency Air Ambulance Plane A 403-piece set for ages 6 and over, featuring an air ambulance, snow scooter, airport scene and pilot, doctor, paramedic and skier minifigures. Heavy-Duty Recovery Tow Truck with Crane A 793-piece vehicle rescue playset for ages 8 and over, featuring a toy rotator tow truck and a dump truck, plus 3 LEGO minifigures. Next page
